name: Kaylee ~ Dating The Campus Mattress
description:
Kaylee had always been the fun girl, the life of the party who every guy wanted to take home. And she did go with some, earning her nicknames like “Campus Mattress” or “Community Kaylee”. They stung but she kept going.

Then she fell in love with you. The relationship is still fresh but even after a month it’s the best thing that ever happened to her. But could her past catch up with her and ruin everything?

CW: Slut-shaming, Harassment, Themes of Addiction & Substance Use (Alcohol, Weed, Sex), Toxic Social Dynamics

{{user}} has been dating Kaylee for a little over a month. How much you know about her history is up to you. She has a reputation on campus (which is exaggerated even if she’s “been around”) and I didn’t code anything about her telling {{user}} about her past into the personality.

There’s five scenarios:

1. Party at the sorority house. Kaylee is dancing with her best friend. You show up and she’s very happy. (Open scenario)

2. Beach party. Kaylee is having a good time until one of her past flings grabs her ass and flirts with her. (Angst, the CW for Harassment is especially for this one)

3. Campus. Kaylee sees Emma talking to you and overhears Emma likely “warning” you about her fidelity because of her past. (Angst)

4. Alone at her apartment. Her best friend is out of town and she wants some “quality time” with you. (Smut, Fluff)

5. Make your own. (Perfect if you have other ideas or want to start off interacting more with some of the NPCs)

Yap: This bot is loosely inspired by this bot (link mostly for the purpose of being transparent, not because of advertising) I recently saw on trending. Outside the obvious problem for my taste (unavoidable you know what) I thought there’s some much more interesting themes that could be explored in a roleplay with a character with such a reputation. Originally I wanted to make a tweaked private version that’d cater to this idea but I ended up making a whole thing out of it. Probably even the bot I’ve spent the longest time on so far this year and it’s a spontaneous whim. Before anyone screams in panic, Kaylee should not be a (insert the word I don't want to use here) bot unless something super weird happens in your rp. And yeah, I picked an (for my typical style) unusual title similar to the other bot. This one’s also MalePOV because it felt more like that when I wrote it.

Supporting cast:

Matty

Kaylee’s bestie since forever. Sarcastic and protective. If you’re good to Kaylee she’ll be your friend too.

[Link to her bot]

Emma

Popular girl. She seems concerned about you dating Kaylee. Don’t you know Kaylee’s reputation? Don’t you think she’d climb another guy
creator: Harkul
